context: The inaugural year of the Dutch Top 40, launched by offshore pirate radio station Radio Veronica. The Beatles utterly dominated with five #1 singles totaling ~29 weeks at the top. The Finnish dance craze 'Letkiss' was an unexpected sensation, holding #1 for 8 weeks. The chart reflected the Netherlands' strong orientation toward Anglo-American pop.

tracks.title: Rock and Roll Music / No Reply
